title: Cursor Update Mod
description:
This mod adds new type of weapon - cursor.
Crafting with vanilla items.
body:
This mod adds a new type of weapon to the game - cursor.
The main reason for the cursor of other weapons is the low damage and very high attack speed.
Cursors receive the same materials as vanilla tools and swords, as well as a special magic cursor that can only be obtained in creative mode.
With this mod you will get a new experience in gaming Minecraft.
